docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-08-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-09-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER ON CONTINUANCE FOR A PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO AUG-23-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN ORTIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONI PAYNE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY ORTIZ, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT PAYNE, TONI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-28-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF 2,000.00 TO BE PAID BY CASHIERS CHECK BY MAY 28, 2022. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED AND A $300.00 PENALTY WILL BE ASSESSED TO THE FINAL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT PLAINTIFF JONATHAN ORTIZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONI PAYNE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2022 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, JONATHAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, JONATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYNE, TONI $2,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,435.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED FEB-04-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAYNE, TONI
